transcription.text: We've asked you to put on a short sock, the length most men wear, and Burlington's new mid-length sock. The mid-length uses lycra in a very special way so it covers your shins, yet can't slip. Can't get that sloppy look. You can't make it fall down. Oh, you can't make Burlington's new mid-length sock fall down. Your shiny shins will never show.

segments.text: We've asked you to put on a short sock, the length most men wear, and Burlington's new mid-length sock.
The mid-length uses lycra in a very special way so it covers your shins, yet can't slip.
You can't make it fall down.
Oh, you can't make Burlington's new mid-length sock fall down.
Your shiny shins will never show.
